reason: Invalid enum raw-state branch is only meaningful in direct library helper tests.
Invalid enum raw-state branch is only meaningful in direct library helper tests.
Direct library branch on injected collateral math state; not a protocol-flow target.
Release-fee clamp is exercised by direct library tests but not mapped reliably under --ir-minimum.
endListing zeroes remaining amount when deactivating a non-sold-out listing, so inactive non-sold-out state cannot persist under valid flows.
Secondary listing-not-found revert is exercised by integration tests but not mapped reliably under --ir-minimum.
buyFromSecondaryListing handles expired listings via early cleanup/return before secondary validation, so this guard is not reached in valid flow.
All external purchase paths validate non-zero amounts before payment collection, so zero-amount transfer-from is unreachable.
Callers gate transfer amounts with positive seller net/fees, so direct zero-amount safeTransfer is unreachable in valid flow.
Protocol fee routing only runs with positive protocol fee or penalty totals; zero-amount route is not reachable from valid external inputs.
Mature voluntary settlement refund path is exercised in tests but not mapped reliably under --ir-minimum.
Release clamp branch requires malformed collateral state under valid protocol semantics.
Invalid collateral amount via enableProceeds(assetId) is exercised in tests but not mapped reliably under --ir-minimum.
First-time enableProceeds initialization path is exercised in tests but not mapped reliably under --ir-minimum.
Initialized collateral with lockedAt == 0 cannot arise through normal flows.
Collateral deposit clamp requires inconsistent accounting state and is not reachable via valid flows.
enableProceeds(assetId) only sizes buffers against current base liquidity, so the post-purchase sufficiency check cannot be satisfied through a valid external flow before this branch executes.
Settled snapshot-earnings claim path is exercised in tests but not mapped reliably under --ir-minimum.
Immediate-proceeds release only runs after coverage is established or on malformed state; valid external flows do not reach a zero-release call site.
allowSkip branch accounting is not reported reliably under --ir-minimum.
No-prior-earnings liquidation helper path is exercised in tests but not mapped reliably under --ir-minimum.
Zero-elapsed helper branch is not reported reliably under --ir-minimum.
Recomputed covered-base clamp is exercised by replenishment preview tests but not mapped reliably under --ir-minimum.
Release recomputation is bounded by base collateral, so exceeding total collateral requires malformed state.
